channel.title: Hugo on A minimal Hugo website
channel.description: Recent content in Hugo on A minimal Hugo website

item.title: CreatePostProcess
item.description: 使用命令或者窗口新建文章 hugo new posts/createPostProcess.md 新建的文章默认根目录content目录,因此新建文章相对路径会是conent/posts/createPostProcess.md 使用编辑器打开创建的文章并编辑 这里使用的编辑器是VSCODE 重启服务器（可选） hugo server hugo服务器具有热加载功能，一些静态文件才需要重启路由器 将Markdown生成Html文件 需要将Markdown生成为html文件才能展示在网页上 hugo hugo命令就是做这一步。生成的html文件存放与public文件夹 进入public文件夹，提交至远程仓库即可 git add . git commit -m "xxx" git push origin main

item.title: A Plain Markdown Post
item.description: This sample post is mainly for blogdown users. If you do not use blogdown, you can skip the first section. 1. Markdown or R Markdown This is a post written in plain Markdown (*.md) instead of R Markdown (*.Rmd). The major differences are: You cannot run any R code in a plain Markdown document, whereas in an R Markdown document, you can embed R code chunks (```{r}); A plain Markdown post is rendered through Goldmark by default, and an R Markdown document is compiled by rmarkdown and Pandoc.
